requirement_topic.en: IEC 61851 Safety Baseline — INTN Conformity and ANDE Project Review
requirement_topic.zh: IEC 61851安全基线——INTN合格评定及ANDE项目审查
requirement_topic.zht: IEC 61851安全基線——INTN合格評定及ANDE項目審查

summary.en: INTN is Paraguay's national technology, standardization, and metrology body and the key reference point for Paraguayan standards and conformity activity. For EV supply equipment, the safety evidence package should be prepared around IEC 61851-1 for conductive charging general requirements and IEC 61851-23 for DC charging stations where applicable. ANDE, importers, project owners, fleets, or charge-point operators may request IEC safety evidence covering the exact charger model or model family before accepting equipment for grid-connected installation. A standalone Paraguay-specific EVSE safety regulation was not confirmed from official sources as of the dataset date, so project and conformity route confirmation is essential.
summary.zh: INTN是巴拉圭国家技术、标准化和计量机构，是巴拉圭标准及合格评定活动的关键参考点。对于电动汽车供电设备，安全证据包应围绕IEC 61851-1传导充电通用要求准备；直流充电站还应覆盖IEC 61851-23。ANDE、进口商、项目业主、车队或充电点运营商可能要求覆盖确切充电桩型号或型号系列的IEC安全证据，作为接受并网安装设备的前提。截至本数据集日期，未能从官方来源确认巴拉圭存在单独的EVSE安全法规，因此必须确认项目要求和合格评定路径。
summary.zht: INTN是巴拉圭國家技術、標準化和計量機構，是巴拉圭標準及合格評定活動的關鍵參考點。對於電動汽車供電設備，安全證據包應圍繞IEC 61851-1傳導充電通用要求準備；直流充電站還應覆蓋IEC 61851-23。ANDE、進口商、項目業主、車隊或充電點運營商可能要求覆蓋確切充電樁型號或型號系列的IEC安全證據，作為接受併網安裝設備的前提。截至本數據集日期，未能從官方來源確認巴拉圭存在單獨的EVSE安全法規，因此必須確認項目要求和合格評定路徑。

standards_or_laws: INTN Paraguayan standards and conformity activity, including adoption or use of international standards where applicable
IEC 61851-1:2017 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 61851-23:2023 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 23: DC electric vehicle supply equipment
IEC 60529 — Degrees of protection provided by enclosures (IP Code) where required by project environment
ANDE and project-owner documentation requirements for grid-connected electrical equipment

summary.en: China's comparable EVSE baseline is GB/T 18487.1-2023, supported by GB/T 20234 connector standards and GB/T 27930-2023 DC communication. GB/T 18487.1-2023 is useful as a design starting point but includes China-specific connector, signaling, and communication requirements. Unless a report explicitly covers IEC 61851 clauses and the supplied IEC connector configuration, a China domestic GB/T test report should not be treated as direct IEC 61851 evidence for Paraguay.
summary.zh: 中国可比EVSE基线为GB/T 18487.1-2023，并由GB/T 20234接口标准和GB/T 27930-2023直流通信支持。GB/T 18487.1-2023可作为设计起点，但包含中国特有的接口、信号和通信要求。除非测试报告明确覆盖IEC 61851条款及供应的IEC接口配置，否则中国国内GB/T测试报告不应被视为巴拉圭的直接IEC 61851证据。
summary.zht: 中國可比EVSE基線為GB/T 18487.1-2023，並由GB/T 20234接口標準和GB/T 27930-2023直流通訊支持。GB/T 18487.1-2023可作為設計起點，但包含中國特有的接口、信號和通訊要求。除非測試報告明確覆蓋IEC 61851條款及供應的IEC接口配置，否則中國國內GB/T測試報告不應被視為巴拉圭的直接IEC 61851證據。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 18487.1-2023 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements

gap.en: Exporters should prepare an IEC 61851-1 clause matrix, accredited IEC safety test reports for the exact model, IEC 61851-23 evidence for DC chargers, enclosure protection evidence appropriate for Paraguay outdoor use, protective device ratings, earthing and isolation documentation, Spanish user and installation instructions, and a model-family explanation. GB/T 18487 evidence should be mapped clause by clause and supplemented where IEC connector or DC communication configurations differ.
gap.zh: 出口商应准备IEC 61851-1逐条矩阵、覆盖确切型号的认可IEC安全测试报告、直流充电桩IEC 61851-23证据、适合巴拉圭户外使用的外壳防护证据、保护器件额定值、接地和绝缘文件、西班牙语用户及安装说明，以及型号系列说明。GB/T 18487证据应逐条映射，并在IEC接口或直流通信配置不同处补充证据。
gap.zht: 出口商應準備IEC 61851-1逐條矩陣、覆蓋確切型號的認可IEC安全測試報告、直流充電樁IEC 61851-23證據、適合巴拉圭戶外使用的外殼防護證據、保護器件額定值、接地和絕緣文件、西班牙語用戶及安裝說明，以及型號系列說明。GB/T 18487證據應逐條映射，並在IEC接口或直流通訊配置不同處補充證據。

mandatory_status.target: Expected and often practically mandatory where INTN conformity, importer due diligence, ANDE project review, fleet procurement, or CPO requirements request IEC safety evidence
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 18487 applies to China domestic design and certification; it is not direct IEC 61851 evidence without clause-level mapping and supplementary testing where needed

source.publisher: INTN (Instituto Nacional de Tecnología, Normalización y Metrología)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Use GB/T 18487.1-2023 as an engineering baseline, not a Paraguay acceptance document. For Paraguay submissions, prepare IEC 61851-1 and, for DC chargers, IEC 61851-23 evidence tied to the exact IEC connector and charger configuration.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应将GB/T 18487.1-2023作为工程基线，而非巴拉圭接受文件。提交巴拉圭资料时，应准备与确切IEC接口和充电桩配置绑定的IEC 61851-1证据；直流充电桩还应准备IEC 61851-23证据。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應將GB/T 18487.1-2023作為工程基線，而非巴拉圭接受文件。提交巴拉圭資料時，應準備與確切IEC接口和充電樁配置綁定的IEC 61851-1證據；直流充電樁還應準備IEC 61851-23證據。
